rationale: Driver incorrectly rejects document approaching max size due to envelope overhead; implementation fix, no specific spec rule violated.
Internal retry-before-fail improvement for monitoring; no specific SDAM spec rule violated, implementation enhancement.
Driver refuses connection to uninitiated replica set member; SDAM spec requires drivers to handle non-primary/secondary states gracefully.
Driver incorrectly removes all replica set members when one member returns isreplicaset:true with no hosts/setName; SDAM spec violation.
Driver treats wnote/jnote as errors in bulk writes against pre-2.6 servers; spec/protocol says these are informational, not errors.
API safety improvement; no spec rule requires throwing on double-execute or empty BulkWriteOperation.
BulkWriteResult.getModifiedCount() must throw for pre-2.6 servers; spec requires this behavior when value cannot be accurately reported.
User confusion about WriteResult.getN() vs shell nMatched; resolved as duplicate/clarification, not a spec violation.
Commands and queries must set slaveOk bit and $readPreference per spec; driver failed to do this correctly.
Tailable cursor close() fails for empty cursors; internal implementation bug, no specific cursor spec rule violated.
Spurious log statement when primary appears unchanged; logging/internal issue, no spec behavior involved.
Regression in BasicBSONObject.equals for nested arrays; internal Java equality semantics, not a BSON spec conformance issue.
Validation of dot-in-field-names not applied to nested arrays; driver-side client validation, not a BSON wire format spec rule.
User confusion about GridFS bucket collections remaining after file remove; clarification/support, not a spec nonconformance.
Thread starvation in monitor due to ScheduledExecutorService design; internal architecture bug, no SDAM spec rule specifies thread model.
Heartbeat retry frequency tuning; internal implementation improvement, no specific SDAM spec rule on retry interval strategy.
Race condition NPE in JMXConnectionPoolListener during pool close; internal threading bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Special setVersion handling unreliable vs spec intent; driver should rely on primary's reported membership per SDAM spec.
Removing unnecessary finalizer from DBPort; internal GC optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Delay DBDecoder construction until socket opens; performance optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Avoid premature query stringification in DBPort; performance optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Wrong unit conversion in log message; logging bug with no spec behavior involved.
Java driver drops null from boolean array during JSON parsing; Python driver mentioned only as comparison, internal JSON parsing bug.
OOM from unbounded _sizes list in tailable cursor; memory/performance bug, no cursor spec rule violated.
NPE in DBCollection.genIndexName; internal null handling bug, no spec behavior involved.
NPE in QueryOpBuilder.hasSpecialQueryFields; internal null handling bug, no spec behavior involved.
Server logs 'couldn't find slave with id 1'; appears to be a server-side log artifact, driver behavior not confirmed wrong.
